classes.name: Client project brief
classes.handling: Structured estimation request fields and optional attachments; may describe customer systems. Not logged in full by default.

classes.name: Estimation output
classes.handling: Generated Markdown (v1) or structured EstimationResult JSON (v2). Returned to client; optional persistence when enabled.

classes.name: LLM provider credentials
classes.handling: OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, and related secrets in .env only; never committed or logged.

classes.name: Semantic cache payload
classes.handling: Embeddings and serialized estimation artifacts in Redis when semantic cache is enabled; TTL and size limits apply.

classes.name: Operational telemetry
classes.handling: Structured logs with provider names, latency, and token usage; DEV_MODE may expose more metadata in API responses.

classes.name: Static CAG examples
classes.handling: Version-controlled few-shot samples under app/context/examples/; no live customer data.

classes.name: Architecture knowledge
classes.handling: Machine-readable Architext JSON under docs/architext/data/; reviewed like code.
